query:
UPDATE puzzles SET ecoCode = CASE 
  WHEN openingName = 'Alekhine Defense' THEN 'B02'
  WHEN openingName = 'Benko Gambit' THEN 'A56'
  WHEN openingName = 'Benoni Defense' THEN 'D43'
  WHEN openingName = 'Bird Opening' THEN 'A02'
  WHEN openingName = 'Bishops Opening' THEN 'C23'
  WHEN openingName = 'Caro-Kann Defense' THEN 'B10'
  WHEN openingName = 'Catalan Opening' THEN 'E04'
  WHEN openingName = 'Dutch Defense' THEN 'A80'
  WHEN openingName = 'English Opening' THEN 'A10'
  WHEN openingName = 'French Defense' THEN 'C00'
  WHEN openingName = 'Grunfeld Defense' THEN 'D80'
  WHEN openingName = 'Italian Game' THEN 'C50'
  WHEN openingName = 'Kings Indian Defense' THEN 'E60'
  WHEN openingName = 'Queens Gambit' THEN 'D20'
  WHEN openingName = 'Ruy Lopez' THEN 'C60'
  WHEN openingName = 'Sicilian Defense' THEN 'B20'
  ELSE 'A00'
END WHERE ecoCode IS NULL;
